title: Negative commands
objectives: Form negative commands using subjunctive forms

vocab.es: no hables / no comas / no vivas
vocab.ru: не говори / не ешь / не живи

vocab.es: no hable / no coma / no viva
no habléis / no comáis / no viváis
no hablen / no coman / no vivan

grammar_notes: ALL negative commands use the present subjunctive — no exceptions for tú.
Compare: 'come!' (eat!, tú affirmative — 3rd-person form) vs 'no comas!' (don't eat!, tú negative — subjunctive).
Russian uses 'не + императив' or 'не + perfective infinitive': 'не говори', 'не сделай этого'. Spanish split forms feel less symmetric — worth memorizing the pair.
